inputs.label: Annual Compensation
inputs.businessContext: Total compensation from employment or net earnings from self-employment (before any contribution).

inputs.label: Contribution Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: The percentage of compensation you contribute to the SEP IRA, up to 25% for employees and effectively lower for self-employed.

inputs.label: Self-Employed (0/1)
inputs.businessContext: Enter 1 if you are self-employed (the calculation adjusts for self-employment), otherwise 0 for employee.

inputs.label: IRS Contribution Limit
inputs.businessContext: The maximum annual contribution limit set by the IRS (e.g., $66,000 for 2023).

formulas.calculatedContribution: const compensation = inputs['annualCompensation']; const rate = inputs['contributionRatePercent'] / 100; const isSE = inputs['isSelfEmployed']; return isSE === 1 ? compensation * rate / (1 + rate) : compensation * rate;
formulas.contributionAfterLimit: const calculated = function() { const c=inputs['annualCompensation']; const r=inputs['contributionRatePercent']/100; const se=inputs['isSelfEmployed']; return se===1? c*r/(1+r) : c*r; }(); const limit = inputs['contributionLimit']; return Math.min(calculated, limit);
